verdict_reasoning: B4GALT1 is a type II Golgi-resident glycosyltransferase anchored to the Golgi membrane with its catalytic domain facing the Golgi lumen. The TM domain is oriented for intra-Golgi function, not plasma-membrane-outer-face exposure. No documented cancer ecto-form, cell-death surface display, activation-induced translocation, tissue-restricted surface pool, lysosomal exocytosis, PM minority cycling pool, or stable TM-partner surface tethering. It remains stably compartmentalized in the secretory pathway.
